description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a weathered red exterior and a large glass front panel displaying several rows of empty product spirals. The glass door is bordered by a metal frame, and the machine shows significant signs of wear, with visible scratches and scuffs across its surfaces. On the right side of the front panel, there is a vertical section housing a keypad and what appears to be a payment interface. The sides and back of the machine are solid red metal, lacking any windows or additional features. The machine is designed to dispense products, likely snacks or drinks, and is typical of those found in urban public spaces. Its robust construction suggests it is intended for heavy use and outdoor placement.
description: A weathered red vending machine with a large glass front, visible product spirals, and a keypad/payment interface on the right side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display, product spirals, keypad, and payment interface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid, worn red metal panel with no features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, scratched red metal back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid red metal panel, similar to the left side, and no visible features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the right side of the front, above the keypad, appearing as a dark, possibly digital screen.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front, featuring a keypad and what appears to be a card slot or bill acceptor.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with individual square buttons is located on the right side of the front panel, arranged in a grid.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular slot is visible at the bottom of the front panel, likely used for retrieving dispensed products.
